attributes.action: Overhaul the Child Maintenance Service to ensure assessments are sustainable.
attributes.additional_details: Current CMS formulas ignore high living costs and care expenses, causing unmanageable debt and financial crisis for many. The system must balance child support with a parent’s ability to survive and afford a stable life.
attributes.background: CMS formulas cause financial crisis by ignoring high living costs and care expenses. This leads to unmanageable debt and 20% fees that compromise a parent's survival. The system must balance child support with a parent’s right to a stable life and financial reality.

rejection.details:
There is another petition already open that appears to ask for what you are seeking, which you may wish to sign instead: 

Reform Child Maintenance calculation: include daytime care and actual costs
https://petition.parliament.uk/petitions/746377
